violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw seafood was stored below raw beef in the stand up cooler in the kitchen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the freezer on the cook line and inside of the reach in cooler needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The front of the salad bar cooler needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors underneath the racking in the downstairs cooler needs to be cleaned.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Store personal beverages below/away from work surfaces. Store in closed containers that protect versus hand to mouth contamination.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw fish and raw shrimp stored nest to raw chicken below raw beef on bottom shelf of single door upright cooler on cook line.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Upright single door cooler on cook line has items temping at 45 degrees F. Sour cream cups and whipped butter cups in tub with ice temping at 60 degrees F.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hood filter doesn't properly fit in hood system above char-grill. Too small.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Anti-slip cutting board mat "stuck" to stainless steel equipment top. Hasn't been properly cleaned for quite some time.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving on cook line needs cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood has build-up of char and grease. Needs cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Basement prep area has exposed rafters above prep areas.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Excessive amount of debris under shelving units and equipment in kitchens, walk in units, and service stations.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
